name: Computershare Limited.
analysis: CPU's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$37.0850. Trade idea: entry A$37.1500, stop A$33.9669, target A$46.6993 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
